_about: Affiliate / partner cards rendered as the 'Helpful services' section on every Fresh Sky AI app. Empty list per category = nothing displayed (the JS hides the section). Add entries as partner IDs are approved.
_disclosure_text: Some pages include 'Helpful services' cards. Those are partner services we may earn a commission from at no extra cost to you. We only feature services we believe genuinely help and they are never required to use any tool.

_entry_shape.name: Brand name (max ~20 chars)
_entry_shape.url: Full affiliate URL with your partner/affiliate ID baked in
_entry_shape.blurb: One-sentence pitch (~80 chars max for layout)
